rationale: The synthetic ensures is the implication `A ==> det_equal`, but inside the body of det_endpoint_pop_head the conjuncts of A are only the antecedent — not real hypotheses, which is why the previous attempt failed.  Fix: case-split on A with `if A { ... }` so every conjunct becomes an in-scope hypothesis, then call a module-scope functional-uniqueness lemma whose preconditions match A and whose ensures pin every field referenced by det_endpoint_pop_head_equal (queue view through pre.skip(1), queue_state/rf_counter/owning_threads/owning_container via transitivity through pre, r1.0 == r2.0 via pre.queue@[0]).  Re-asserting each conjunct of det_equal after the lemma call lines up the triggers explicitly; the implicit else branch makes the implication vacuously true.
